title: hibiscus luteus
intro: Hibiscus luteus, also known as the yellow hibiscus or orange mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of hibiscus luteus are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of hibiscus luteus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
